reason_codes.description: Gate 2 lacks raw StoreKit transaction logs and UI capture
Gate 3 simulator layout proof cannot substitute for physical iPad Air hardware proof
Gate 4 requires generic iOS Release .xcarchive bundle generation
Founder ceremony unauthorized until operational evidence blockers are resolved

GATE-2-PURCHASE.name: Native RevenueCat / StoreKit Purchase Qualification
GATE-2-PURCHASE.blocking_reason: StoreKit payment sheet presentation and sandbox execution pending raw transaction log proof

GATE-3-DEVICE.name: Device Qualification (iPad Air 11" M4)
GATE-3-DEVICE.blocking_reason: Simulator layout qualification cannot substitute for physical iPad Air hardware proof

GATE-4-ARCHIVE.name: Xcode Build Archive Generation
GATE-4-ARCHIVE.blocking_reason: Generic iOS Release .xcarchive bundle generation pending pre-archive qualification checks

GATE-5-FOUNDER.name: Founder Submission Authorization
GATE-5-FOUNDER.blocking_reason: Founder submission authorization withheld until prerequisite operational gates are qualified
